criteria.Details: Destination reputation lookups completed for IP/domain/URL indicators with provider outputs (IP verdict=unknown, domain verdict=suspicious_destination, URL verdict=unknown).
Network snapshot telemetry included process image and destination address correlation for 64 connection record(s).
Destination action-band mapping produced audit/warn/block outcomes across internal, unknown, and high-risk destinations.
Isolation trigger logic maps high-confidence malicious destinations to block and low-confidence malicious destinations to warn.

additionalPhase5Checks.name: Phase 5 PAM request queue visibility
additionalPhase5Checks.details: Endpoint snapshot surfaced pending PAM requests and PAM health posture from local runtime paths.

additionalPhase5Checks.name: Phase 5 PAM audit visibility
additionalPhase5Checks.details: Endpoint snapshot exposed PAM approval/denial counts from the local audit journal.

additionalPhase5Checks.name: Phase 5 local-admin membership audit
additionalPhase5Checks.details: Fenrir resolved local Administrators membership posture with 2 member(s); exposure state is elevated.

additionalPhase5Checks.name: Phase 5 household role propagation governance
additionalPhase5Checks.details: Fenrir validated household role policy SID lists, but owner SID is not configured yet.
additionalPhase5Checks.remediation: Set the owner SID through local.household.roles.apply before enforcing long-lived household role governance.

additionalPhase5Checks.name: Phase 5 admin baseline persistence
additionalPhase5Checks.details: Runtime database persisted local admin baseline snapshot records and latest-baseline lookup succeeded.
